falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 index closes above 5,200 (10% above current level) within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A clear bullish breakout invalidating the HOLD signal and suggesting a strong upward trend contrary to the bottom pattern expectation

falsification_conditions.condition: The 14-day moving average of the VIX volatility index drops below 18
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained low volatility would contradict the blowoff score of 40 and indicate market complacency, falsifying the uncertainty in the current verdict

falsification_conditions.condition: The Federal Reserve announces a 50-basis-point rate cut in its next policy statement
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A major policy shift would directly invalidate the HOLD signal by introducing a clear external catalyst opposing the bottom pattern's expected trajectory

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
